Meaning.Vi: Cây trồng; vụ mùa; sản lượng thu hoạch
Meaning.En: A plant such as wheat, corn, or rice that is grown in large quantities, especially for food or commercial use.
Meaning.Example: The rice crop was destroyed by the flood.

Situation.Vi: Nông dân đang thu hoạch lúa – một vụ mùa quan trọng.
Situation.En: Farmers harvesting rice – an important seasonal crop.

Meaning.Vi: Trồng trọt; thu hoạch; cắt ngắn (tóc, lông…)
Meaning.En: To grow or harvest a crop; also, to cut something short, especially hair or fur.
Meaning.Example: They crop the sheep’s wool once a year.

Situation.Vi: Nông dân cắt ngắn cỏ để làm thức ăn cho gia súc.
Situation.En: The farmer cuts (crops) grass to feed livestock.
